summary: Full scene flow audit tracing all transitions from IntroCeltOS boot to run end. 12 checks total: 2 CRITICAL, 4 HIGH, 4 MEDIUM, 2 PASS. CRITICAL: GameFlowController defined but never instantiated (HubScreen/Run3D path is dead code). CRITICAL: BroceliandeForest3D still routes to MerlinGame.tscn (old card scene) for run encounters. HIGH: Two competing hub scenes (HubAntre active vs HubScreen dead). HIGH: IntroPersonalityQuiz.tscn + SceneRencontreMerlin.tscn orphan scenes still in /scenes/ (director said delete, q-20260414-005). HIGH: Two competing run scenes (MerlinGame active vs Run3D dead). HIGH: IntroCeltOS routes to Menu3DPC, not MenuPrincipal (GameFlowController uses MenuPrincipal). MEDIUM: ParchmentPreRun bypasses HubAntre. MEDIUM: SelectionSauvegarde routes to HubAntre (old hub). MEDIUM: Some transitions use get_tree().change_scene_to_file() without PixelTransition fallback check. MEDIUM: MerlinCabinHub.tscn status unclear (orphan?). PASS: All .tscn files referenced by active code exist. PASS: Minigame system connected in MerlinGameController.

checks.details: scripts/core/game_flow_controller.gd defines GameFlowController with clean flow (Menuâ†’HubScreenâ†’Run3Dâ†’EndRunScreenâ†’Hub) but is NEVER instantiated anywhere. Not an autoload, not in any scene. The entire HubScreen/Run3D path is dead.

scripts/broceliande_3d/broceliande_forest_3d.gd:9 GAME_SCENE = 'res://scenes/MerlinGame.tscn'. When _merlin_found=true (line 1222) it routes to MerlinGame.tscn (old card scene). The old scene is technically functional but creates a dead-end without a clean EndRun â†’ Hub transition.

Director q-20260414-005: 'B: Supprimer IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin'. Both scenes still exist in /scenes/. IntroPersonalityQuiz.gd:12 still references SceneRencontreMerlin.tscn as NEXT_SCENE. Task E2E-DELETE-ORPHAN-SCENES P3 still pending.

checks.check: Competing hub scenes: HubAntre vs HubScreen
checks.details: Active path uses HubAntre.tscn (BroceliandeForest3D:8, SelectionSauvegarde:4, HubAntre.gd). GameFlowController references HubScreen.tscn (core/game_flow_controller.gd:44). HubScreen.tscn exists but is never loaded in active play. Creates confusion.

checks.check: Competing run scenes: MerlinGame vs Run3D
checks.details: Active path uses MerlinGame.tscn (BroceliandeForest3D:9 GAME_SCENE). GameFlowController uses Run3D.tscn (game_flow_controller.gd:45). Run3D.tscn exists with Run3DController but is never loaded in active play. Director q-20260414-004: migrate to GameFlowController.

checks.check: IntroCeltOS â†’ Menu3DPC vs GameFlowController â†’ MenuPrincipal
checks.details: IntroCeltOS.gd:516 routes to Menu3DPC. GameFlowController:47 SCENE_MENU = MenuPrincipal. Two menus with different scripting. MenuPrincipalMerlin.gd uses MENU_NEW_GAMEâ†’ParchmentPreRun while GameFlowController goes through start_game(). Divergence creates split paths.

scripts/ui/parchment_pre_run.gd:7 SCENE_FOREST = BroceliandeForest3D. New game goes: MenuPrincipalâ†’ParchmentPreRunâ†’BroceliandeForest3D, bypassing HubAntre entirely. Hub is only visited via SelectionSauvegarde (continue game). No biome/ogham selection on first run.

checks.check: SelectionSauvegarde â†’ HubAntre (old hub) on continue
checks.details: scripts/SelectionSauvegarde.gd:4 GAME_SCENE = HubAntre.tscn. Continue game loads old hub. Should eventually route to whichever hub is canonical after GFC migration.

scripts/broceliande_3d/broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1215 uses direct get_tree().change_scene_to_file('HubAntre') without trying PixelTransition first. Missing pixel transition animation on HubAntre return.

scenes/MerlinCabinHub.tscn exists. scripts/merlin_cabin_hub.gd references MENU_SCENE = Menu3DPC. Unclear if this is an active scene or orphan. No code in active flow routes to it. Possible 3rd orphan hub.

scripts/ui/merlin_game_controller.gd:108 _minigame_runner = GameControllerMinigame.new(self). Line 535: score = await _minigame_runner.run_minigame(mg_field, ...). All 8 lexical field minigames in scripts/minigames/. System correctly connected.

implementation_notes: Wired MerlinReputationSystem.get_unlocked_content(faction_rep) into get_fastroute_card() and _build_llm_context(). Faction-gated cards (with 'faction' field) are now excluded when rep < 50. Faction-aligned cards (dominant faction from ADD_REPUTATION effects) are boosted 2x weight. Added _card_dominant_faction() helper. LLM context now includes 'unlocked_factions' array.
